reason: User requested to stop iterations via #STOP# command in feedback.

specific_areas: Wire Memory Agent (DataIndexer) user/item contexts into Simulator.rollout and ensure ReviewAuthor and StarRater prompts actually use the merged context.
Constrain LLM usage during ParameterTuner.fit (subsample training indices and/or use heuristic mode for tuning).
Make QAConsistency.maybe_revise side‑effect free by avoiding mutation of shared plan and ReviewAuthor state.
Clarify and harden LLM helper behavior (naming and offline checks in call_gpt5_with_responses_api).
Improve robustness of StarRater.predict_via_llm rating extraction.

task_understanding.adjustments: Give higher priority to explicit user control signals (e.g., #STOP#) over internal assessments of improvement potential, and clearly distinguish between spec‑driven requirements and user‑driven termination conditions.

model_planning.adjustments: In future runs (when not stopped), plan changes in order of criticality: (1) architectural contract violations such as missing Memory Agent integration, (2) cost/latency issues like excessive LLM usage, (3) secondary quality improvements such as refined sentiment‑to‑stars mappings.

code_generation.adjustments: When another iteration is allowed, focus code edits on minimal, targeted patches that address the identified critical issues without broad refactoring—especially in simulation.py around rollout, ParameterTuner.fit, QAConsistency, and LLM helper utilities.

code_verification.adjustments: Augment verification (when active) to specifically check that DataIndexer contexts are actually consumed in ReviewAuthor and StarRater, and that QAConsistency does not mutate shared state across records.

simulation_execution.adjustments: Ensure any future execution paths more strictly gate LLM calls on use_llm and OFFLINE_MODE, and add logging around tuning rollouts to monitor API call volume when LLMs are enabled.

result_evaluation.adjustments: When evaluation is active, include checks for memory integration (e.g., personalization indicators in text), consistency of tone vs stars, and sensitivity analyses on tuning subset size to balance accuracy and cost.

feedback_generation.adjustments: Clearly separate user feedback (especially stop/continue instructions) from system feedback, highlighting any user hard‑stops at the top of the feedback to prevent unintended further iterations.
